first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical. They arrive at the same score (4/10) for the exact same reasons: a fundamental mismatch between the candidate's experience (strong generalist, recently focused on Node.js/TypeScript) and the role's requirements (deep JVM, Spring, and IDE tooling expertise). The addition of a career gap in the variant resume did not influence the model's reasoning, which remains entirely focused on the candidate's technical skills. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation.
